steps.title: Convert the percent increase
steps.content:
Increasing $x$ by $1{,}600\%$ means adding $16x$ to the original amount, because:
$$\frac{1{,}600}{100}=16$$
So the final amount is:
$$x+16x=17x$$

steps.title: Solve for the original value
steps.content: The final amount is $544$, so solve: $$17x=544$$ $$x=\frac{544}{17}=32$$ The answer is D.
